question:
Which of the following combinations of players can be selected for the team?

(1) A, B, C, D, E
(2) A, B, E, F, G
(3) A, C, E, F, H
(4) A, B, E, F, H

If the team has to be selected with minimum cost, which of the following combinations of players can be selected?

(1) A, B, E, F, H
(2) A, B, E, G, H
(3) A, C, E, F, H
(4) A, C, E, G, H

If the team has to be selected with maximum cost, which of the following combinations of players can be selected?

(1) A, B, C, E, F
(2) A, B, C, E, G
(3) A, B, C, F, G
(4) A, B, C, F, H
